test_suite: ClawChives v3.0 Release 3 — HardShell Integration & Unit Tests

phase_4.name: Phase 4: Ephemeral Lobster Sessions + Accurate Badge Counts

tests: creates session + ephemeral key on success (201)
key expiration_date is ~15 min from now (within ±5s tolerance)
rejects close of another user's session (403)
revokes the ephemeral key on close (is_active = 0 in DB)
returns errorCount: 0 and errors: [] when no errors accumulated
errors accumulate in session when X-Session-Id provided
successful imports do NOT add to errors_json
unknown session ID is silently ignored (no 500)
closed session ID is silently ignored (no 500)
ephemeral key can import bookmarks while session active
ephemeral key rejected after session closed (401)
ephemeral key auto-expires after 15min (test with manually set past expiration_date)
two sessions for same user are independent (different keys)
closing session A does not affect session B's key

stats_endpoint.description: Dashboard Overview accuracy — eliminated hardcapped count ceiling
coverage: GET /api/bookmarks/tags returns array of all unique tags (no pagination cap)
useBookmarkStats() hook fetches independent of pagination
useTags() hook returns accurate tag count for entire library
Pinchmarks badge displays true DB total on first render (not capped at 50)
Tags count displays all unique tags (not capped at first page)
Real-time updates after Lobster session close
DashboardView receives real stats props instead of counting loaded array
stats_endpoint.note: Tested indirectly through build gates and integration tests. Manual verification confirms counts are accurate up to 250+ bookmarks.

middleware.name: Middleware Unit Tests (Express Handlers)
coverage: Database constraint violations (409 UNIQUE, FOREIGN KEY)
Stack trace visibility (dev vs prod mode)

integration_security.name: Integration Tests — Security & Auth
coverage: Key generation randomness (OWASP: cryptographically secure 64-char keys)
Agent revocation: is_active = 0 blocks all requests with 401

body_validation.name: Body Validation & Input Handling
tests: skips items missing URL field (counts as failed)
skips items with invalid URL format (counts as failed)

happy_path.name: Import Logic — Happy Path
tests: imports 20 unique URLs with all optional fields
returns correct response shape { success, imported, failed, errors[] }

duplicates_race.name: Duplicate Detection & Race Conditions
tests: detects duplicate within same batch (imported: 1, failed: 1)
detects URL already in DB from previous import
correctly splits mixed valid + duplicate URLs

jinaurl_guard.name: jinaUrl Agent Guard
tests: agent key with jinaUrl field fails per-item (not whole request, 207)

response_integrity.name: Response Integrity & Math Verification
tests: errors array contains { url, reason } for each failure
imported + failed + errors.length math checks out
large batch (100 items) returns correct counts

rate_limiter.name: Rate Limiter Bypass Verification
tests: agent key bulk endpoint bypasses apiLimiter (no 429)

integration_lobster_sessions.name: Integration Tests — Lobster Session Lifecycle
coverage: Session error accumulation via X-Session-Id header

integration_phase_3.name: Integration Tests — Phase 3 (Mass Import & Performance)
coverage: Mass import: 1000 URLs in 10 batches of 100
Duplicate detection at scale (500 new + 500 duplicates)
Error recovery: Partial failures + data integrity
Data consistency: Duplicate skipping without corruption

integration_build_gates.name: Integration Tests — Build Validation Gates
integration_build_gates.note: Gates all pull requests on build + test success

functions: createTestDatabase() — creates isolated test SQLite DB with full schema
cleanupTestDatabase(db, path) — closes DB and removes file
resetTestDatabase(db) — clears all rows from all tables
bug_fixes: Fixed: resetTestDatabase deleted from 'tokens' instead of 'api_tokens'

functions: createTestUser(db, overrides) — inserts user with UUID, username, key_hash
createTestFolder(db, userUuid, overrides) — inserts folder under user
createTestBookmark(db, userUuid, overrides) — inserts bookmark with optional folderId
createTestAgentKey(db, userUuid, overrides) — inserts agent key with lb-* prefix
createTestSession(db, userUuid, overrides) — inserts import_sessions record
bug_fixes: Fixed: createTestAgentKey was missing expiration_type (NOT NULL)
Added: rateLimit, isActive, expirationType, expirationDate fields
Added: createTestSession for Lobster session testing

database.isolation: Each test suite uses separate DATA_DIR (tests/data, tests/data-lobster-session, etc.)
database.schema: Full production schema applied in beforeAll
database.constraints: UNIQUE (user_uuid, url), foreign_keys = ON, WAL mode
database.cleanup: afterAll() closes DB and removes test file

auth_setup.pattern: Raw DB inserts, never HTTP endpoints (avoid rate limit consumption)
auth_setup.agent_keys: Directly inserted with all required columns (id, api_key, permissions, expiration_type, etc.)
auth_setup.test_users: Unique UUID + username per test run to avoid UNIQUE conflicts
auth_setup.human_tokens: api- prefix tokens stored in api_tokens table with owner_type='human'

vitest_configuration.note: No vitest.config.ts — using defaults (parallel execution with pool='threads')
vitest_configuration.batch_size_limit: ≤ 100 items per test to avoid Express 413 body size limit
vitest_configuration.data_dir_pattern: Environment set before server.js import to isolate test databases

tests: agent key with jinaUrl field fails per-item

critical_paths_verified: ✓ Permission checks enforced (403 for write-protected agents)
✓ Key lifecycle respected (revoked, expired keys blocked)
✓ UNIQUE constraint on (user_uuid, url) prevents duplicates
✓ jinaUrl field restricted to human keys (agents get per-item error)
✓ Rate limiter bypassed for bulk endpoint (no 429 on Lobster keys)
✓ HTTP 207 Multi-Status always returned (never 500 on partial failures)
✓ Error array contains { url, reason } for each failure
✓ Response math: imported + failed = total items submitted
✓ Ephemeral keys generated with lb-eph- prefix
✓ Session error accumulation via X-Session-Id header
✓ Badge counts reflect true DB total (not pagination-dependent)
✓ Stats cache invalidated on all mutations

known_limitations.rate_limiter_load_test: Smoke test only — not tested under sustained high load (would require load testing framework)
known_limitations.concurrent_duplicate_race: Simulated via in-batch duplicates — true concurrent race would require async test harness
known_limitations.db_corruption_recovery: Not tested — better-sqlite3 handles corruption transparently
known_limitations.network_timeout_handling: Not tested — Express/Supertest assumes LAN latency

future_test_additions: Load: Concurrent bulk imports from multiple agents
Compliance: Audit log verification for all imports (verify log entries created)
End-to-end: Full flow from export JSON → bulk import → verify counts
Stats: Load test GET /api/bookmarks/stats under concurrent access
